meta.title: Cambria Press Forgotten Partnership Redux Canada-US Relations.wmv
meta.description:
Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Christopher Sands discusses the work of Johns Hopkins University Professor Charles F. Doran and a new book of essays entitled Forgotten Partnership Redux: Canada-U.S. Relations in the 21st Century, which Sands co-edited with Greg Anderson of the University of Alberta, and has been published by Cambria Press.

Visit www.cambriapress.com/books/9781604977622.cfm for more information and to purchase the book.
